meta.title: Metschnikowia koreensis sp. nov., a novel yeast species isolated from flowers in Korea
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: A novel ascomycetous yeast was isolated from flowers of Lilium sp. and Ipomoea sp. in Korea. The name Metschnikowia koreensis sp. nov. (type strain SG99-34(T)=CBS 8854(T)=KCTC 7998(T)) is proposed for this novel species based on comparative sequence analyses of the D1/D2 domain of 26S rDNA and phenotypic characteristics.
